changelog: Fix: VPN routing probe now falls back to SOCKS5 validation on any openConnection failure (not just EPERM) — resolves 'internet not routed through VPN' false negative on many Android ROMs
Fix: SOCKS5 handshake verified with real protocol exchange before TUN setup — catches Xray inbound misconfiguration early
New: adb log tags SETALINK_TUN_STARTED / SETALINK_SOCKS_READY / SETALINK_ROUTE_ADDED / SETALINK_DNS_OK / SETALINK_HTTP_OK for field diagnostics
New: Diagnostics screen Tunnel Layer card shows TUN / SOCKS5 / Xray / DNS / Internet layer status with live bytes
Fix: Immediate failure if SOCKS5 handshake returns invalid response — prevents silent Xray inbound misconfiguration
New: Permanent User ID (SL-227-XXXXXXXX) generated on first registration, shown on Profile and used as TON payment memo
New: Admin panel shows User ID as primary device identifier with country flag, device model, and last IP
Fix: Device identity stabilised via native SharedPreferences (android_id hash) — no more duplicate device rows on restart
Fix: Country auto-detected server-side from request IP — country column now always populated
